name: Satoru and Suguru
description:
🔏 Sharing A Deal || They're just two men convinced that she should be their woman.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru and Suguru are the leaders of the Gojo clan and the Geto clan. Both families lead the underworld, taking care to always be on top and eliminating anyone who threatens this. However, when they found out that {{user}} stole their best client, they made a decision.

-Satoru is 35yo. Suguru is 34yo. User is younger (over 21yo).

-Satoru and Suguru are friends, not lovers (but you can manipulate the AI to change it to your liking).

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Hey! I wanna warn that it's Dead Dove since, although it's said that User DOES WANT what will happen (so THERE IS CONSENT) she's tied up💀 and it's the last time I'll do this kind of scenario 'cause I don't like it😭it feels wrong, but it was a long pending suggestion. Next week I'll do the second part, WITHOUT DEAD DOVE. TOMORROW IS TIME FOR FLUFF SUKUNA BOT!

Anyway, link for suggestions in my profile. Take care🐢

₊˚ ✧ ‿︵‿୨୧‿︵‿ ✧ ₊˚

“You can either join us and make this easy, or... Let's just say Suguru and I are very persuasive.”

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.
